subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down in truth from God, the Sovereign, the Manifest Truth, and verily it is a revelation from the presence of the All-Knowing... O my Lord! I have come unto Thee, detached from all else save Thee, turning toward the sanctuary of Thy nearness and good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله الملک الحق المبین و انه لتنزیل من لدن علیم... ای رب اتیتک منقطعاً عما سواک و مقبلاً الی حرم قربک و رضاک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
